exam_name: CPA Exam – Tax Compliance and Planning (TCP) — Discipline
question_types: Task-Based Simulations (TBS) — research, document review, journal entries, calculations
exam_price_notes: Candidates choose one discipline section (BAR, ISC, or TCP).

testing_centers.notes: Computer-based testing at Prometric authorized test centers globally

id_requirements: One primary government-issued photo ID (e.g., passport, driver's license) AND one secondary ID. Both must have the same name matching NTS (Notice to Schedule) exactly.
exam_rules: Closed-book. On-screen calculator, spreadsheet, and authoritative literature provided. No personal items, notes, or devices in exam room. Optional scheduled break available. Must use a Notice to Schedule (NTS) issued by state board to register for exam.
renewal_options: CPA license renewal requirements vary by state board. Typically 40 hours of CPE per year (or 80 hours per 2 years). Contact your state board for specific requirements.

retake_policy.notes: Must wait until test results are released before retaking the same section. All four sections (3 core + 1 discipline) must be passed within 30 months of passing the first. CPA exam offered year-round (continuous testing).

domains.name: Tax Compliance and Planning for Individuals and Personal Financial Planning

official_study_resources.title: CPA Exam Blueprint
official_study_resources.notes: Free downloadable blueprints showing skill levels and representative tasks for each section

official_study_resources.title: AICPA Sample Tests
official_study_resources.notes: Free sample tests available to familiarize with exam interface and question types
